name: Mapa desde HDP (Desktop)

steps.name: Click on span "Mostrar en el mapa"

multiLocator.cl: /descendant::*[contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Button_small__fZ12G ") and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Button_text-flat__yB4ME ")]/descendant::*[contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Typography_bold__KOIhT ")]
multiLocator.clt: /descendant::*[contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Button_small__fZ12G ") and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Button_text-flat__yB4ME ")]/descendant::*[contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), " Typography_bold__KOIhT ")]

element.targetOuterHTML: Mostrar en el mapa
